title: selliguea likiangensis
intro: Selliguea likiangensis, also known as the Liangshan polypodium, is a type of plant belonging to the Polypodiaceae family of ferns. It is traditionally used in medicine, particularly in China, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Selliguea likiangensis include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Selliguea likiangensis is often combined with other plants to create teas, infusions, and decoctions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
